title: struthiopteris brasiliensis
intro: Struthiopteris brasiliensis, also known as the Raulin's leather fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Struthiopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Struthiopteris brasiliensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
